highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.150.0 ships 10 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Promote remaining pre-v4 obsoletes to error and trim obsolete enums from the ref assembly; perf(SKSurface): cache the Canvas wrapper across calls; small-sigma raster blur regression (define SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS)

preview_summaries.rc1: Release Candidate 1 carried SKPaint.GetFastBounds() for quick-reject culling; small-sigma raster blur regression (define SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS); perf(SKSurface): cache the Canvas wrapper across calls; SKColorFilter.CreateOverdraw() for overdraw visualization; SKImageFilter.CreateCrop(); SKImageFilter.CreateEmpty() method; Merge upstream chrome/m150 bug fixes.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 carried Promote remaining pre-v4 obsoletes to error and trim obsolete enums from the ref assembly; deprecated .NET Interactive (Polyglot Notebooks) support; harfbuzz to 14.2.1.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried Skia to milestone m150 (4.150.0).
